'''vangadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiorecognition|enantiorecognition]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiorecognition|enantiorecognition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vangadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vængædhæth|vængædhæth]] || [[word:vængædhæj|vængædhæj]] || [[word:vængædhæsh|vængædhæsh]] || [[word:vængædhæ|vængædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vangangadhath|vangangadhath]] || [[word:vangangadhaj|vangangadhaj]] || [[word:vangangadhash|vangangadhash]] || [[word:vangangadha|vangangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vangadhath|vangadhath]] || [[word:vangadhaj|vangadhaj]] || [[word:vangadhash|vangadhash]] || [[word:vangadha|vangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vangafdhafth|vangafdhafth]] || [[word:vangafdhafj|vangafdhafj]] || [[word:vangafdhafsh|vangafdhafsh]] || [[word:vangafdhaf|vangafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vangadhatha|vangadhatha]] || [[word:vangadhaja|vangadhaja]] || [[word:vangadhasha|vangadhasha]] || [[word:vangadhaka|vangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vangadhath|vangadhath]] || [[word:vangadhaj|vangadhaj]] || [[word:vangadhash|vangadhash]] || [[word:vangadha|vangadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vangadhathal|vangadhathal]] || [[word:vangadhajal|vangadhajal]] || [[word:vangadhashal|vangadhashal]] || [[word:vangadhakal|vangadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vangadhaathatha|vangadhaathatha]] || [[word:vangadhaajaja|vangadhaajaja]] || [[word:vangadhaashasha|vangadhaashasha]] || [[word:vangadhaaka|vangadhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vangadhathan|vangadhathan]] || [[word:vangadhajan|vangadhajan]] || [[word:vangadhashan|vangadhashan]] || [[word:vangadhakan|vangadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vangadhathaoro|vangadhathaoro]] || [[word:vangadhajaoro|vangadhajaoro]] || [[word:vangadhashaoro|vangadhashaoro]] || [[word:vangadhakaoro|vangadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
